topics: Application of BIM (Building Information Modelling) software for designing and drafting building fire protection systems
Use of spread sheets in computing and graphically representing data in safety and fire engineering
Use of statistical software for safety application - regression, ANOVA, statistical tests of significance
Applications of consequence modelling software in quantitative risk assessment (QRA)
Scientific computing using MATLAB to solve safety engineering problems
Application of system simulation in solving plant safety problems
Fire and smoke modelling using open-source software
Monte Carlo simulation - Application to uncertainty propagation
Monte Carlo simulation - Application in resolving numerical integrals (Trivial Integration, Simple Integration and Double Integration)
Exercises in reliability engineering to find out MTTR, repair rate and lifetime distribution
